summary: Identify the workplace barriers affecting you
Match each barrier to practical support
Write a clear request without oversharing
Know what to do if your request is delayed or refused

downloads.title: Reasonable adjustment request template
downloads.description: A simple email structure using barrier, impact, adjustment and reason.

downloads.title: Workplace barriers checklist
downloads.description: Identify physical, communication, workload, sensory and policy barriers.

downloads.title: Follow-up email template
downloads.description: Chase delayed or unclear responses without sounding aggressive.

downloads.title: Adjustment review notes
downloads.description: Record whether agreed adjustments are working and what needs to happen next.

fullGuideCta.heading: Read the full guide
fullGuideCta.text: Prefer the full explanation? Open the complete Access Stamp guide with examples, template wording, common mistakes and next steps if your employer delays or refuses.
